# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Publish Artifacts
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # Shallow clones are not suitable for building and testing the project.

      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: adoptium/action-openjdk@latest
        with:
          java-version: 11.0.12

      - name: Build
        run: ./gradlew build

      - name: Archive artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: compiled-binaries
          path: build/distributions/<your-application>.zip

      - name: Archive deployment scripts
        run: |
          mv deployment/* ../
          tar cvfz deployment.tar.gz .
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        continue-on-error: false # In case the script fails, it won't affect further steps and workflow continues

      - name: Upload deployment scripts artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: ../deployment.tar.gz

    artifacts:
      - name: compiled-binaries
      - name: deployment-scripts
